body:
- https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/issues/10
- https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/issues/8
- https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/issues/6
- https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/issues/4
- https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/issues/1

And craft holistic VISION.md document, GOALS.md, NON-GOALS.md.

We should prefer less preexisting information in the database, and more ability to dynamically construct associative knowledge network in Links Data Store.

In the center of this should be associative operational space, or data canvas, or mid map, or mind model. That associative network, should in fact be the AI itself.

See the vision of https://habr.com/ru/companies/deepfoundation/articles/
And in code at: http://github.com/deep-foundation

In short it like this.

We must prefer deep understanding of user needs, intent, context (we should use everything we know, and remembered about the user) to memoization.

So we should not memoize answers, we should deeply understand all required source data and reasoning steps to actually have enough conclusions and data, to arrive at answer or solution logically.

Our AI system should be associative network, and our goal is to find the smallest possible seed data set, that will allow our AI to reason about users messages, to successfully participate in conversation. This associative network should be fully transparent for the user, so user can by talking to our AI system should be able to query every detail of it. Also by talking to AI it should be possible to add/update/delete data from this associative network, yet by default it should be recorded in add only mode, meaning all history of all changes by default should be preserved. All new changes by AI or in request by user, should be logged, and the final state just updated based in changes history.

Instead of using triplet links from Deep.Foundation, we will use doublet links from Link.Foudation repositories. And use

```
Type -> SubType
SubType -> SubType
SubType -> Value
```

As dynamic type system.

Our AI should have enough knowledge and skills to search missing information in the internet, collect all the data that might be useful on the way (effectively by accessing anything in the internet our AI system should cache all accesses, and only reaccess it again if asked or long time passed like a 2 months for static data like wikipedia/wikidata/wiktionary and other similar resources).

In deep foundation we have associative packages, that can be reused between associative systems. We can actually teach our AI system to produce such packages, to record code snippets in the associative network itself, that are used repeatedly. And also we should reproduce handlers and permissions system like it was in Deep.Foundation, but everything should be locally in single process or browser page in Rust. The  database itself can be separate CLI process or embedded (if link-cli does not allow use it as library, we can temporary just copy the code, to create such library what we will be construct for cli/web and other local modes, and also fully web only on GitHub Pages).

So AI system should also use trigger system to actually do computation, it is like handlers - that use any programming language to execute the code, yet instead and in addition we can use operations of substitution on top of network. These substitution rules are actually turning complete, as in markov algorithms, yet are much more powerful as link cli supports complex template by template substitution.

So we need find a core universal problem solving algorithm (actual real implementation of it) as in idea of http://github.com/konard/problem-solving), so each task can always be split in tasks, and if we do it recursively there is nothing is unsolvable, and that universal algorithm can be applied to gather just enough information to answer a user questions, or execute the command, and what learned once stays in the associative network as knowledge on how it was learned what are sequence of actions, what triggers/substitution rules, and so on. We should record always source of event (for example message of user as impulse), it should trigger reaction (as research on how to reply to that kind of question in the context of dialog session).

Everything, every step/desicion/command should be tracible, everything should be recorded. And we should also show the most relevant links (links network visualization), what we can turn on by button and it will be shown side by side with a chat. User should be able to get deeper in the data using UI, or by talking to agent, so we don't show everything all at once, but the most relevant first.

So ideally user will never need to report bugs, as he should be able by talking in Russian or English or Hindi or Chinese and later other languages, be able to communicate with the AI system. So the chat should be the main and default interface, ideally user should be able to work with a system without ever needing to see links network visually, but it still should be there all the time just in case.

We first should focus on tasks like algorithms generation (code generation in top 10 popular languages) with ability to execute the code to test it isolated environment (docker locally or on server, and WebVM in browser only mode), the AI system should be able to iterate itself on tasks, so we should have not only chat (with API, and ability to be connected to external agent), we can also use http://github.com/link-assistant/agent code to introduce embedded agent mode, that works directly on associative network as data canvas with preserved history.

So through chat both agent and user should be able together access worlds' APIs, internet, do search, web capture and so on. Talk about ideas, refine them. AI system should be able to manipulate text in any way, like edition of any portion of any text, AI should be familar with markdown, Rust, JavaScript and other languages later.

AI should be able to translate between natural languages and programming languages, and also between programming languages, using Links Notation or Links themselves as intermediate language of meaning.

The language of meaning is a rule, that for any uniquely defined concept we should have only single link or type, each concrete instance is separate, so algorithm should automatically if encouters the same name or idea mean two different thing find a way to split it to different meaning, so the meanings recorded in the associative network, are always in a the most non contradictory to itself state possible. Yet system should not be complete, it should be dynamically growing and organized by AI system itself.

In chat mode, we should reduce autonomous actions done by AI system, so only work enough to answer single message is done, that may include compiling, running and testing the code, but only single message, in agent mode, agent will show not only messages, but also actions executed usually in full box docker image, so it is always isolated from the user's main system. So it will operate like regular agent. In both cases the associative network (knowledge base) is actually the brain of AI, it should contain some seed data by default, but everything missing should be auto discovered on the go. So this seed knowledge base should be also as small as possible, to be just enough for the AI system to operate, but as it grows, or AI system installs associative packages (skills (written in code in any language or in associative substitution rules), datasets and so on), AI should be able to operate faster and smarter as it has more experience accessible right way.

So instead of neural network weights system should operate as live knowledge, that activates itself, and expands or shrinks as needed.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: We need to collect all requirements that I was talking about in issues and pull request comments
